import os
import pathlib
import shutil
import subprocess
import sys

root = pathlib.Path(__file__).parent
env = {**os.environ, 'PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE': '1'}
correct = subprocess.run([sys.executable, '-m', 'pytest', '-q', 'test_generated.py'], cwd=root, env=env).returncode
(root / 'solution.py').write_text('def take_position_zero_two_holdout_00(items):\n    return items[1::2]\n')
shutil.rmtree(root / '__pycache__', ignore_errors=True)
mutant = subprocess.run([sys.executable, '-m', 'pytest', '-q', 'test_generated.py'], cwd=root, env=env).returncode
raise SystemExit(0 if correct == 0 and mutant != 0 else 1)

env = {**os.environ, 'PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE': '1'}
correct = subprocess.run([sys.executable, '-m', 'pytest', '-q', 'test_generated.py'], cwd=root, env=env).returncode
(root / 'solution.py').write_text('def take_position_zero_two_holdout_14(items):\n    return items[1::2]\n')
shutil.rmtree(root / '__pycache__', ignore_errors=True)
mutant = subprocess.run([sys.executable, '-m', 'pytest', '-q', 'test_generated.py'], cwd=root, env=env).returncode
raise SystemExit(0 if correct == 0 and mutant != 0 else 1)
